chapter_title.en: The Rules of Forgetfulness (sahw) in Prayer

parts.text: سَأَلَ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ:
رَجُلٍ نَسِيَ أَنْ يُكَبِّرَ حَتَّى دَخَلَ

text: اَلصَّلاَةِ فَقَالَ «أَ لَيْسَ كَانَ فِي نِيَّتِهِ أَنْ يُكَبِّرَ» قَالَ نَعَمْ قَالَ «فَلْيَمْضِ فِي صَلاَتِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.999 - The Halabi asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about a man who forgot to say the Takbir (the opening Takbir) until he had entered the prayer.
Imam (as) said: "Was it not in his intention to say the Takbir?"
He replied: "Yes."
Imam (as) said: "Then let him continue with his prayer."
